scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/realtime && npm run build -w apps/worker && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/waiter && npm run build -w apps/kitchen
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/shared && npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/realtime && npm run lint -w apps/worker && npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/waiter && npm run lint -w apps/kitchen
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/realtime && npm run typecheck -w apps/worker && npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w apps/waiter && npm run typecheck -w apps/kitchen
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/waiter && npm run test -w apps/kitchen
scripts.seed: npm run build -w apps/api && tsx scripts/seed-all.ts
scripts.create:admin: npm run build -w apps/api && tsx scripts/create-admin.ts
scripts.sync-indexes: npm run build -w apps/api && tsx scripts/sync-indexes.ts
